parameters.text:
=👋 Welcome to the AI Store Readability Auditor, {{ $json.firstName }}! 
I'll help you find out how clear and customer-friendly your Shopify store is.

To get started:
Step 1️⃣ — Send me your store URL
Example: yourstore.myshopify.com

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet

parameters.text:
=✅ Got your store URL!

Now please paste your Shopify API token.
It looks like this: shpat_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

⚠️ You only need to do this once — I'll save it securely.

=🔐 Token saved! Your store is now connected.

You're all set, {{ $json.firstName }}! 🎉

=⏳ Fetching your store data and running the audit...
This takes about 15–20 seconds. Hang tight!

assignments.name: promptText
assignments.value:
=You are an AI Store Audit Engine.

Analyze only the data provided. Do not invent or assume anything.

IMPORTANT: This store has exactly {{ $('HTTP Request').item.json.products.length }} products.

Product titles in this store:
{{ $('HTTP Request').item.json.products.map(p => p.title).join('\n') }}

STORE DATA:
{{ $('HTTP Request').item.json.products.map((p, i) => 'PRODUCT ' + (i+1) + '\nTitle: ' + p.title + '\nDescription: ' + (p.body_html ? p.body_html.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim() : 'NO DESCRIPTION') + '\nPrice: ' + (p.variants[0].price || 'NOT SET') + '\nVendor: ' + (p.vendor || 'NOT SET') + '\nStatus: ' + p.status + '\nImages: ' + (p.images.length > 0 ? 'Yes' : 'MISSING') + '\nSKU: ' + (p.variants[0].sku || 'NOT SET') + '\nInventory: ' + (p.variants[0].inventory_quantity ?? 'NOT SET') + '\nWeight: ' + (p.variants[0].weight || 'NOT SET')).join('\n\n---\n\n') }}

STRICT RULES:
- Use only the data provided above
- Never invent products, issues, or fields
- Never repeat the same product or issue twice
- Never contradict yourself
- Only flag fields that are actually missing or empty
- No markdown, no symbols, no asterisks, no backslashes
- One blank line between every section and every item
- Plain text only

Reply in this exact format:

STORE AUDIT REPORT

OVERALL SCORE: X out of 10


PRODUCT HEALTH SUMMARY

Total Products: {{ $('HTTP Request').item.json.products.length }}

Healthy Products: X

Products With Issues: X


ISSUES DETECTED

List each product only once. Never repeat the same issue.

Product: exact product title

Severity: Critical or High or Medium or Low

Issue: one clear sentence about what is wrong

Impact: one line on how it affects the merchant

Product: next product title

Severity: level

Issue: one clear sentence

Impact: one line

If no issues write exactly: No issues detected.


MISSING DATA FIELDS

List each product only once with all missing fields on one line.

Product: exact product title
Missing: field1, field2, field3

If nothing is missing write exactly: No missing fields detected.


TRUST SIGNALS

Reviews: Present or Missing
Note: one line only.

Return Policy: Present or Missing
Note: one line only.

Shipping Policy: Present or Missing
Note: one line only.

Brand Story: Present or Missing
Note: one line only.


HOW AI AGENTS SEE YOUR STORE

Write 2 lines only. Be direct. No filler sentences.


AI READINESS BREAKDOWN

Data Completeness: X out of 10
Reason: one line.

Clarity: X out of 10
Reason: one line.

Trust Signals: X out of 10
Reason: one line.


PRIORITY ACTION PLAN

Maximum 5 actions. No repeats. Only real actions based on data above.

Priority: Critical or High or Medium
Action: exact action to take
Reason: one line why it matters

Priority: next level
Action: next action
Reason: one line

Priority: next level
Action: next action
Reason: one line


FINAL SUMMARY

Biggest problem: one line.

Most important fix: one line.

parameters.text:
=⏳ Fetching your store data...
This takes about 15–20 seconds. Hang tight!

assignments.name: promptText
assignments.value:
=You are a Shopify copywriter fixing products for a merchant.

This store has exactly {{ $('HTTP Request3').item.json.products.length }} products.

Product titles in this store:
{{ $('HTTP Request3').item.json.products.map(p => p.title).join('\n') }}

Full product data:
{{ $('HTTP Request3').item.json.products.map((p, i) => 'PRODUCT ' + (i+1) + '\nTitle: ' + p.title + '\nDescription: ' + (p.body_html ? p.body_html.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim() : 'MISSING') + '\nPrice: ' + (p.variants[0].price || 'NOT SET') + '\nVendor: ' + (p.vendor || 'NOT SET') + '\nSKU: ' + (p.variants[0].sku || 'NOT SET') + '\nImages: ' + (p.images.length > 0 ? 'Yes' : 'MISSING') + '\nInventory: ' + (p.variants[0].inventory_quantity ?? 'NOT SET') + '\nWeight: ' + (p.variants[0].weight || 'NOT SET')).join('\n\n---\n\n') }}

----------------------------------

FIX CONDITIONS:

Fix a product ONLY IF:
- Description is MISSING or under 40 words
- Price is NOT SET or 0
- Vendor is NOT SET
- SKU is NOT SET
- Images are MISSING
- Inventory is NOT SET or 0
- Weight is NOT SET

----------------------------------

EDGE CASE:

If ALL products are complete, reply EXACTLY:
All products look good. No fixes needed.

----------------------------------

STRICT FORMATTING RULES (VERY IMPORTANT):

- Plain text only
- No symbols, no asterisks, no backslashes, no markdown
- Do NOT print numbers or raw values
- Each label must be on its own line
- After every label, leave ONE blank line
- Each field must be on its own line
- Each product block must be separated by ONE blank line
- Never repeat a product
- Never merge multiple lines

----------------------------------

OUTPUT FORMAT (FOLLOW EXACTLY):

PRODUCT FIX REPORT

Total Products: {{ $('HTTP Request3').item.json.products.length }}

Products That Need Fixing:
product title
product title


----------

PRODUCT: exact product title

NEW TITLE:

improved title or same if fine

NEW DESCRIPTION:

40 to 60 plain words focused on user and benefit

MISSING FIELDS:

only include missing fields, one per line


----------

PRODUCT: next product title

NEW TITLE:

text

NEW DESCRIPTION:

text

MISSING FIELDS:

only missing fields


----------

TOTAL FIXED: X out of {{ $('HTTP Request3').item.json.products.length }}

assignments.name: promptText
assignments.value:
=```
You are a Shopify store assistant. Use only the data provided below. Never invent, assume, or guess anything.

User message: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.userText }}

Store products:
{{ $('HTTP Request5').item.json.products.map(p => 'Title: ' + p.title + '\nPrice: ' + (p.variants[0].price || 'Not available') + '\nVendor: ' + (p.vendor || 'Not available') + '\nSKU: ' + (p.variants[0].sku || 'Not available') + '\nDescription: ' + (p.body_html ? p.body_html.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim() : 'Not available')).join('\n\n---\n\n') }}

STRICT RULES:
- Use only one case per reply
- Use only data provided above
- Never combine two cases in one reply
- Never add extra sentences beyond what the case says
- If data is missing say exactly: Not available
- Never guess, infer, or make up product details
- Plain text only, no markdown, no symbols, no asterisks

CASE 1 - Greeting (hi, hello, hey, good morning, good evening, how are you):
Reply with exactly this one line only:
Hello {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.firstName }}! How can I help you today?

CASE 2 - User asks to list products or what is in the store:
Reply with only the product titles from above, one title per line.
Nothing else.

CASE 3 - User asks about a specific product by name:
Find that product in the data above and reply with only its details.
If the product is not found reply with exactly: I could not find that product in your store.

CASE 4 - User asks about price, vendor, SKU, or description of a product:
Answer using only that product data from above.
If the information is missing reply with exactly: That information is not available.

CASE 5 - User message is not related to Shopify or ecommerce:
Reply with exactly: I can only help with your Shopify store.

CASE 6 - User message is unclear or does not match any case above:
Reply with exactly: I did not understand your request. Please choose a command below.

Always end every reply with exactly this on a new line:

Available commands:
/audit - Analyze your store
/fix - Improve product descriptions
/perception - See how AI views your store
/chat - Ask questions about your store
/status - Check connection status
/start - Restart conversation
```

parameters.text:
=⏳ Fetching your store data...
This takes about 15–20 seconds. Hang tight!

assignments.name: promptText
assignments.value:
=You are an AI shopping agent like Google Shopping or Amazon Rufus.

A customer asked you to find and recommend products from this store. Based only on the data below, explain why you would or would not recommend this store.

PRODUCTS:
{{ $('HTTP Request7').item.json.products.map(p => 'Title: ' + p.title + '\nDescription: ' + (p.body_html || 'NO DESCRIPTION') + '\nPrice: ' + (p.variants[0].price || 'NOT SET') + '\nVendor: ' + (p.vendor || 'NOT SET') + '\nImages: ' + (p.images.length > 0 ? 'Yes' : 'MISSING') + '\nSKU: ' + (p.variants[0].sku || 'NOT SET')).join('\n---\n') }}

You are speaking directly to the merchant. Be honest and specific.

Reply in this exact format. Plain text only. No symbols. No markdown:

HOW AI CURRENTLY SEES YOUR STORE

WHAT I SEE WHEN I READ YOUR STORE:
Write 3 sentences describing exactly what information is available and what kind of store this appears to be based only on the data above.

WHY I AM NOT RECOMMENDING YOUR STORE RIGHT NOW:
- specific reason 1 based on actual missing or weak data
- specific reason 2
- specific reason 3

WHAT QUESTIONS CUSTOMERS ASK THAT I CANNOT ANSWER:
- specific unanswered question a real shopper would ask
- specific unanswered question
- specific unanswered question

HOW OTHER STORES ARE BEATING YOU:
- specific advantage a competitor with complete data would have over this store
- specific advantage
- specific advantage

WHAT YOU NEED TO FIX SO I START RECOMMENDING YOU:
1. specific fix based on actual data gaps
2. specific fix
3. specific fix

BOTTOM LINE:
One honest sentence telling the merchant exactly why AI agents are skipping their store today.

parameters.text:
=🤖 AI Store Assistant – Help Guide

I can help you improve your Shopify store using AI.

Here’s how to use me:

🔗 Step 1: Connect your store
Send your store URL
Example: mystore.myshopify.com

🔐 Step 2: Add your API token
Paste your Shopify Admin API token
(It starts with shpat_)

🔒 Your data is safe. You can reset anytime using /reset

---

📊 Available Commands:

/audit
Get a full store analysis with score, issues, and improvement plan

/fix
Rewrite weak or missing product descriptions

/perception
See how AI shopping agents understand your store

/chat
Ask anything about your store (products, issues, suggestions)

/status
Check your connected store

/start
Disconnect and start fresh

/help
Show this guide again

---

=📌 Store Connection Status

❌ No store connected

To get started:

1️⃣ Send your store URL
Example: mystore.myshopify.com

2️⃣ Send your Shopify API token
(It starts with shpat_)

---

🔒 Your data is secure and used only for analysis

Type /start to begin

=📌 Store Connection Status

✅ Status: Connected

🏪 Store URL: {{  $json.storeURL }}
🔐 API Token: Connected

---

You’re ready to use all features:

/audit – Analyze your store
/fix – Improve product descriptions
/perception – See how AI views your store
/chat – Ask anything about your store

=🤔 I didn’t understand that

I can help you with your Shopify store, but I didn’t recognize your request.

Try one of these commands:

/audit – Analyze your store
/fix – Improve product descriptions
/perception – See how AI views your store
/chat – Ask questions about your store
/status – Check connection status
/start - Restart conversation

---

💡 Example:
/chat Which product needs improvement?

---

If you’re just getting started, type /start

What would you like to do next?

=Token not working

I could not authenticate your Shopify store

Possible reasons:
Token expired
Token revoked
Missing required permissions

Fix steps:
1 Go to Shopify Admin
2 Open your custom app
3 Regenerate Admin API token
4 Enable Products read access

Also check your store URL
Example mystore.myshopify.com

Error code {{ $json.error.code }}

Paste the new token to try again
Or type /start to reconnect your store

=Invalid API Token

I couldn’t authenticate your Shopify store with this token.

Please check:

The token starts with
It is copied completely (no missing characters)
There are no extra spaces before or after

---

Make sure your token has access to:

Products (read access required)

---

How to get a valid token:
Go to Shopify Admin , Apps , Develop apps , Create app , Generate Admin API token

---

Please paste your API token again
